notes.text: Story created: "Workplace Fire Safety Training" — 15/15 moments generated. Written to C:/autovrse/jsonClaw/stories/fire-hsd-yard.json

objectives: Identify fire hazards in the workplace
procedures: Pull the safety pin from the fire extinguisher
Aim the nozzle at the base of the fire
Squeeze the handle to release the extinguishing agent
Sweep the nozzle from side to side at the base of the fire
Evacuate the area if the fire cannot be controlled
Proceed to the designated assembly point
sopContext.constraints: Always maintain a safe distance from the fire. Never attempt to fight a fire that is spreading rapidly or blocking your exit route. Evacuate immediately if the fire extinguisher is empty or ineffective. Only trained personnel should attempt to extinguish fires. Emergency services must be contacted for all fire incidents regardless of size.

moments.name: Identify Blocked Exit
moments.userAction: Look at and identify the blocked emergency exit
moments.successHint: Visual highlight appears with voice-over: 'Correct. Blocked exits are a critical fire hazard.'
moments.spatialContext: Exit door with boxes stacked in front, located 3m ahead at eye level

moments.name: Identify Electrical Hazard
moments.userAction: Look at and identify the overloaded power strip
moments.successHint: Icon appears above hazard with voice-over: 'Yes. Overloaded circuits can cause electrical fires.'
moments.spatialContext: Power strip on floor beneath desk, 2m to the right at ground level

moments.name: Identify Flammable Storage
moments.userAction: Look at and identify improperly stored flammable materials
moments.successHint: Warning symbol displays with voice-over: 'Correct. Flammable materials must be stored in approved containers away from heat sources.'
moments.spatialContext: Red containers near heat source, 4m ahead at waist height

moments.name: Approach Fire Extinguisher
moments.userAction: Walk to and grab the fire extinguisher from wall mount
moments.successHint: Extinguisher releases from mount with audio cue and voice-over: 'Good. Always know where extinguishers are located.'
moments.spatialContext: Red fire extinguisher mounted on wall 1.5m high, 2m to your left

moments.name: Pull Safety Pin
moments.userAction: Grab and pull the safety pin from the fire extinguisher
moments.successHint: Pin releases with metallic sound and voice-over: 'Step 1 complete: Pull the pin.'
moments.spatialContext: Yellow pin at top of extinguisher handle, grab with free hand

moments.name: Aim at Fire Base
moments.userAction: Point the nozzle at the base of the simulated fire
moments.successHint: Targeting reticle appears green with voice-over: 'Correct aim. Always target the base of the fire, not the flames.'
moments.spatialContext: Fire is 3m ahead at ground level, aim nozzle downward at base

moments.name: Squeeze Handle
moments.userAction: Squeeze the handle to release extinguishing agent
moments.successHint: White discharge spray appears with pressure sound and voice-over: 'Good. Maintain steady pressure.'
moments.spatialContext: Squeeze trigger on handle while maintaining aim at fire base

moments.name: Sweep Side to Side
moments.userAction: Move the nozzle from side to side across the base of the fire
moments.successHint: Fire diminishes progressively with voice-over: 'Excellent sweeping technique. Cover the entire base area.'
moments.spatialContext: Sweep nozzle horizontally 1m left to right while maintaining base aim

moments.name: Confirm Fire Extinguished
moments.successHint: Fire disappears completely, smoke clears, voice-over: 'Fire successfully extinguished. Well done.'
moments.spatialContext: Fire area now clear with minimal smoke, 3m ahead at ground level

moments.name: Assess Uncontrolled Fire
moments.userAction: Look at the large spreading fire that cannot be controlled
moments.successHint: Warning alarm intensifies with voice-over: 'This fire is too large. Evacuation is required immediately.'
moments.spatialContext: Large fire spreading across wall, 5m ahead blocking one exit path

moments.name: Call Emergency Services
moments.userAction: Grab the emergency phone and activate 911 call
moments.successHint: Phone connects with dial tone then emergency operator voice: '911, what is your emergency?'
moments.spatialContext: Red emergency phone on wall 1.5m high, 2m to the right

moments.name: Report Fire Emergency
moments.userAction: Speak or press to report the fire location and situation
moments.successHint: Voice-over confirms: 'Emergency services dispatched. Evacuate immediately.'
moments.spatialContext: Speak into phone or press report button to transmit emergency information

moments.name: Locate Safe Exit Route
moments.userAction: Look at and identify the unblocked emergency exit with illuminated sign
moments.successHint: Exit sign glows brighter with voice-over: 'Correct exit identified. This route is clear.'
moments.spatialContext: Green exit sign illuminated above door, 4m behind you to the left

moments.name: Evacuate Through Exit
moments.userAction: Walk to and push through the emergency exit door
moments.successHint: Door opens with alarm sound, exterior light visible, voice-over: 'Good. Never use elevators during fire emergencies.'
moments.spatialContext: Push bar on door at waist height, door opens outward to exterior

moments.name: Proceed to Assembly Point
moments.userAction: Walk to the designated assembly point marker in the parking area
moments.successHint: Assembly point highlights with voice-over: 'You have reached the assembly point. Wait here for headcount and further instructions.'
moments.spatialContext: Green assembly point sign in parking lot, 15m from building entrance in open area
